CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISNULL(Booking__r.DLP_Start_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Booking__r.DLP_End_Date__c)), DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) >= Booking__r.DLP_Start_Date__c, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) <= Booking__r.DLP_End_Date__c ), "Within DLP Period", IF( OR( ISNULL(Booking__r.DLP_Start_Date__c), ISNULL(Booking__r.DLP_End_Date__c) ), "DLP Dates Not Set", "Post DLP Period" ) )
CustomField.label: DLP Status
